subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Consider the words of Ansari, who said: "O my Lord! If but once Thou shouldst call me Thy servant" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالله در قول انصاری ملاحظه کن که گفته الهی اگر یکبار بگوئی بنده من از
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
